name: Text Filter Input
notes: onChange fires handleFilterChange({ searchQuery: value }), which shallow-merges the update into state.filters.
Filtering is purely client-side via filterDocuments(documents, filters) in render(); no API call is triggered.
Match is case-insensitive substring against document.name and each element of document.tags[].
searchQuery resets visually when the component unmounts; it is not persisted to URL, session, or localStorage.
